M-068.NAME: paid-tariff-catalog
M-068.path: backend/app/billing backend/app/core/migrations.py backend/alembic/versions/phase50_paid_tariff_catalog.py frontend/src/pages/Subscription.tsx frontend/src/pages/Config.tsx frontend/src/i18n/index.ts frontend-admin/src/pages/Plans.tsx scripts/phase50-tariff-catalog-smoke.mjs scripts/phase53-user-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs scripts/phase54-admin-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs scripts/phase68-dashboard-subscription-smoke.mjs scripts/phase73-config-amnezia-qr-smoke.mjs scripts/phase74-admin-shell-navigation-smoke.mjs README.md docs/plans/Phase-50.xml docs/plans/Phase-53.xml docs/plans/Phase-54.xml docs/plans/Phase-68.xml docs/plans/Phase-73.xml docs/plans/Phase-74.xml
M-068.owns: Canonical three-plan paid tariff catalog, server-authoritative payment amounts, device-limit checkout guards, compact tariff presentation in the user frontend, and historical hidden admin tariff inspection code retained for regression only after Phase-74.
M-068.purpose: Guarantee that clean deployments and existing deployments converge to the approved KrotPN paid tariff matrix without trusting frontend-provided prices.

exports.fn-canonical-tariff-catalog: Return the approved paid tariff definitions: 1 device for 369 RUB, 6 devices for 693 RUB, and 9 devices for 936 RUB.
exports.fn-upsert-canonical-tariffs: Idempotently create or update canonical plan rows without duplicating plans on backend restart.
exports.fn-validate-checkout-plan: Validate that a selected plan is active, canonical, and compatible with the user's current consumed device slots before payment creation.
exports.ui-user-tariff-cards: Render exactly three compact user-facing tariff cards with price, duration, device limit, and checkout action.
exports.ui-admin-tariff-matrix: Historical hidden admin tariff matrix retained for Phase-50/54 regression proof only; Phase-74 removes it from visible admin navigation and direct route display.
exports.smoke-phase50-tariff-catalog: Static smoke for user/admin tariff copy, canonical price/device-limit values, and protected deploy/install surfaces.

constraints.constraint-1: Frontend may submit only plan_id; backend must derive price, currency, duration_days, device_limit, description, and YooKassa metadata from server-side canonical state.
constraints.constraint-2: Clean deploys and backend restarts must not create duplicate plan rows or silently leave stale canonical prices active.
constraints.constraint-3: Purchasing a lower device-limit tariff must be blocked when active or blocked device slots already exceed the target limit.
constraints.constraint-4: Pending four-day trial behavior from M-063 remains unchanged; successful paid checkout cancels pending trial and activates paid access immediately after payment webhook.
constraints.constraint-5: Personal MTProto proxy entitlement remains verified-email based and is not moved behind paid tariffs in Phase-50.
constraints.constraint-6: Do not modify install.sh, deploy scripts, docker-compose, nginx routing, TLS material, VPN runtime topology, or MTProto runtime topology.
constraints.constraint-7: Phase-74 may remove only the visible admin tariff section and direct /plans display; backend catalog, user purchase cards, checkout guards, canonical values, and Phase-50 regression proof remain intact.

acceptance-metrics.metric-1: Public billing plans API returns exactly the three active canonical tariffs in sort order with 30-day duration, RUB currency, and device limits 1, 6, and 9.
acceptance-metrics.metric-2: Payment creation and YooKassa payload use backend-derived amounts 369.00, 693.00, and 936.00 and include non-secret tariff metadata.
acceptance-metrics.metric-3: Device provisioning enforces the purchased plan limit and checkout blocks incompatible downgrades before payment creation.
acceptance-metrics.metric-4: User and admin frontends build and show compact, Russian, mobile-safe tariff surfaces with no stale placeholder CRUD wording.
acceptance-metrics.metric-5: Backend tariff, billing, device-limit, migration, frontend build, admin build, static smoke, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, and protected deploy/install diff guard pass.
acceptance-metrics.metric-6: Phase-50 verification design is complete before execution: deterministic assertions, trace markers, UI/API contract, and protected-surface guard are explicitly mapped in V-M-068.
acceptance-metrics.metric-7: Phase-53 smoke confirms Matrix subscription UI preserves canonical tariff slugs, server-authoritative checkout shape, and mobile readability.

M-068.evidence: 2026-06-03: Phase-53 and Phase-54 frontend/admin builds and smokes passed for Matrix tariff UI while preserving backend canonical 369/693/936 RUB prices, 1/6/9 device limits, plan_id-only checkout shape, and readonly admin canonical plan controls. 2026-06-04: Phase-68 smoke and Phase-50 tariff smoke passed after display aliases changed to KrotPN Self/Family/Team without changing canonical slugs, prices, limits, or checkout shape.

phase-54-verification-design.surface-1: Admin Plans Matrix verification must preserve exactly KrotPN 1/6/9 with 369/693/936 RUB prices and 1/6/9 device limits.
phase-54-verification-design.surface-2: Admin tariff UI must stay inspection-focused without accidental canonical edit/delete controls or frontend-controlled money fields.
phase-54-verification-design.surface-3: Mobile smoke must prove compact readability for tariff rows/cards without horizontal overflow.

phase-54-execution.surface-1: Admin Plans page is compact Matrix-styled and marked with canonical tariff readability plus no-CRUD drift guards.
phase-54-execution.surface-2: Phase-54 did not change billing catalog, payment creation, YooKassa payloads, device-limit guards, migrations, or deploy/install surfaces.
phase-54-execution.surface-3: 2026-06-03: Phase-54 smoke confirmed KrotPN 1/6/9 canonical tariff values and absence of admin create/update/delete plan controls.

phase-73-executed-scope.primary-behaviors: Expose only the display tariff name in the config page device-limit exhausted copy; canonical tariff slugs, prices, duration, device limits, checkout payload, and admin tariff surfaces remain unchanged.
phase-73-executed-scope.verification: Phase-73 smoke passed display-name-only and device-limit-message-safe markers; no billing API, YooKassa, device-limit enforcement, or admin plan code changed.

M-068.phase-73-evidence: Config page reads existing subscription display data for copy only and maps legacy KrotPN 1/6/9 names to Self/Family/Team presentation aliases.

phase-74-executed-scope.primary-behaviors: Remove visible admin Tariffs navigation and redirect direct /plans to dashboard while keeping backend canonical tariffs and user-facing tariff purchase UI unchanged.
phase-74-executed-scope.verification: Phase-74 smoke passed ADMIN_TARIFF_UI_REMOVED_ONLY and CANONICAL_TARIFFS_PRESERVED markers; Phase-50 tariff smoke remains part of the regression suite.

M-068.phase-74-evidence: Admin tariff UI is retired from the shell only; canonical slugs krotpn-1/krotpn-6/krotpn-9, prices, device limits, checkout shape, and user tariff aliases remain protected.
M-068.hotspot: H-055: Paid tariff catalog must keep server-authoritative prices, canonical device limits, no duplicate clean-deploy plans, and no deploy/install drift
